name: Multiple Employer RRTA Tax Election

eligibility.description: Available when an employee is paid by two or more railroad employers in the same month; requires notice to the Secretary and agreement between employers.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows one employer to elect to apply the RRTA tax to the full monthly compensation cap, limiting the liability of other concurrent employers for the same employee.
